title: Thigh highs etc.
description: A small addon for the mod Etcetera which adds Thigh highs to the cotton wear! Crafted with cotton in the shape of boots.
body:
![Title Thigh Highs](https://i.imgur.com/6HxoZdh.png)
# About Thigh Highs etc.
A small addon to Etcetera that adds thigh highs made out of cotton material from that mod(And mabye more in the future ;))
## Mod-loader and Version
This mod is being developed for Fabric and Forge. No backports are planned.
# Content
![thigh highs inventory image](https://i.imgur.com/JrJQocG.png)

Thigh Highs in all colors + trader thigh highs which are exclusive to the wandering trader!
# Crafting
![thigh highs crafting](https://i.imgur.com/kJXBneD.png)

Grow some cotton and place it in crafting to get yourself white Thigh Highs, now you can dye it to any color!
# Required
The mod this is an addon for, Etcetera.

[![etcetera logo](https://i.imgur.com/Todemx1.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/etcetera)
